A Few Options for You

A few options tailored to you

Dear Jordan,

Thank you for considering AussieLoanAI. While your recent loan application wasn't approved, here are a few options that may suit your current situation.

Option 1: Bonus Rate Savings Account

•  Bonus rate of 5.00% p.a.: Earn a bonus rate when you deposit $500 per month and make five card transactions.

•  No account-keeping fees: Free to open, free to operate.

Directing part of your monthly income into this account rebuilds savings while earning a competitive return.

Option 2: Smaller Personal Loan

•  Lower monthly repayments: A $12,000 loan at 6.50% p.a. over 36 months is approximately $368 per month.

•  Shorter path to approval: A smaller loan amount reduces serviceability concerns.

A reduced loan amount keeps repayments comfortably within your disposable income.

Call Sarah on 1300 000 000 to discuss either of these options.

Kind regards,

Sarah Mitchell

Senior Lending Officer
